title: 500ML Bottles with Caps, 3 Pack Squeezy Sauce Bottles, Plastic Squeeze Dispensers with Measurements for Ketchup, BBQ, Sauces, Syrup, Dressings
features: The condiment bottle is made of high quality food grade soft plastic, safe, non-toxic, tasteless, durable and lightweight. And easy to squeeze
A small cap is attached to ensure safety and hygiene, and squeeze bottle will not leak when tipping over
The plastic bottle is transparent and easy to identify. You can also label it more easily
Ideal for condiments such as ketchup, mayonnaise, salad dressing, chili sauce, barbecue sauce, olive oil, mustard sauce and more
This kit comes with 3 bottles of 500 ml. The slim body design allows you to store several in a cabinet or refrigerator at a time without taking up too much space
description: Product Description Feature: - The thread is deep, and the cap is not easy to slip off, so you can use it with confidence. - The small cap ensures safety and hygiene, and the squeeze bottle will not leak if tipped. - The sauce bottle has two graduations for easy identification. Clear graduations control the distribution of spices. It is a good helper for beginners. - The kit comes in 5 x 500ml bulk bottles. You can also use it for crafts like tie-dye to complete your beautiful paintings. Pastry Companion You can add delicious condensed milk sauce on bread and cakes, which is convenient to use. Baking Expert Ketchup bottle is the ideal helper for both beginners and professional chefs, you can use it easily. Multifunctional: It can be used to decorate desserts, cakes or various condiments, syrups, sauce, oils, vinegars. Also can be used for storing liquid paints or handmade soap dyes for crafts and arts.
